metadata.title: About Xpandia | Spanish Expertise, Language Assurance & Cultural Intelligence
metadata.description: Meet Xpandia, a boutique Spanish expertise firm helping AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt Spanish experiences for real users.
metadata.ogTitle: About Xpandia | Spanish Expertise, Language Assurance & Cultural Intelligence
metadata.ogDescription: Meet Xpandia, a boutique Spanish expertise firm helping AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt Spanish experiences for real users.

hero.h1: Spanish expertise for companies building across languages, cultures, and markets.
hero.sub: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt Spanish experiences for Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.
hero.body: We combine senior Spanish language expertise, localization judgment, applied cultural intelligence, and product-aware QA to help teams build Spanish experiences users can understand, trust, and act on.

positioning.headline: A language firm specialized in Spanish quality, adaptation, and cultural intelligence.
positioning.body1: Xpandia was created for companies that need more than translation. We support teams building products, content, AI experiences, support journeys, campaigns, and market strategies for Spanish-speaking users.
positioning.body2: Our work sits at the intersection of language, culture, product, and business judgment. We help teams understand what works in Spanish, what creates friction, what needs adaptation, and what is ready for real users.
positioning.callout: Xpandia gives teams the expert judgment and structured guidance they need to move from assumptions to confident decisions.

differentiators.headline: Spanish quality shapes trust, adoption, and growth.
differentiators.intro: Companies can generate, translate, or review Spanish in many ways. But when Spanish affects product experience, customer trust, conversion, support, or market readiness, teams need more than language fluency or a quick review. Xpandia brings the structure, cultural context, product awareness, and senior judgment needed to understand what is working, what creates friction, and what needs to improve before a Spanish product reaches real users.

cards.title: Senior Spanish judgment
cards.body: Expert review grounded in language quality, meaning, clarity, tone, terminology, naturalness, and audience fit.

cards.title: Localization and product context
cards.body: Spanish evaluated or adapted inside real product, UX, content, support, marketing, and learning environments.

cards.title: Applied Cultural Intelligence
cards.body: Cultural insight that helps teams understand trust signals, audience expectations, communication style, and market fit.

cards.title: AI and output evaluation
cards.body: Structured review of AI-generated Spanish outputs, chatbot responses, tutors, copilots, agents, and support flows.

cards.title: Decision-ready evidence
cards.body: Scorecards, issue taxonomies, severity ratings, annotated examples, recommendations, and executive readouts.

cards.title: Practical business focus
cards.body: Recommendations designed for Product, AI, Localization, CX, Support, Marketing, EdTech, and leadership teams.

founder.headline: Led by senior expertise in language, localization, quality assurance, and cultural intelligence.
founder.body1: Xpandia was built around a practical belief: Spanish quality is not only a language issue. It is a product, trust, customer experience, and market-readiness issue.
founder.body2: Our work is led by a team of experts in Spanish, Language Assurance, QA, localization, and Applied Cultural Intelligence experts who help global companies turn Spanish quality questions into clear business decisions.
founder.name: Nestor Solano
founder.title: FOUNDER, XPANDIA APPLIED CULTURAL INTELLIGENCE SAS
founder.bio1: Nestor leads Xpandia's work at the intersection of Spanish quality, localization, and Applied Cultural Intelligence. His background includes 20+ years supporting global teams, including work with Fortune 500 companies, across translation, language QA, localization management, GTM strategy, and cross-cultural communication in multilingual business contexts.
founder.bio2: Working with a network of senior experts, he brings the linguistic, cultural, and business judgment teams need to deliver Spanish experiences that are clear, trusted, culturally aligned with the Spanish-speaking audiences they serve.

howWeWork.headline: Focused, practical, and designed for teams that need decisions.

steps.title: Understand the context
steps.body: We clarify your product, audience, Spanish variant, business goal, timeline, content type, and current challenge.

steps.title: Evaluate or adapt
steps.body: We apply the right mix of Spanish expertise, localization judgment, cultural intelligence, QA criteria, and product awareness.

steps.title: Deliver clear evidence
steps.body: You receive findings, recommendations, adapted assets, scorecards, issue logs, frameworks, or training materials your team can act on.

steps.title: Recommend the next move
steps.body: We help your team decide whether to ship, fix, retest, adapt, train, govern, or scale.

startingPoints.headline: Start with the engagement your team needs now.
startingPoints.intro: Xpandia engagements are scoped based on your product, audience, volume, complexity, timeline, and level of customization.
startingPoints.pricingNote: Final pricing is confirmed after a short diagnostic call and scope review.

cards.title: Diagnostics
cards.body: A fast expert read before choosing the right engagement.

cards.title: AI Spanish Quality Audit Sprint
cards.body: To validate AI-generated Spanish outputs before users rely on them.

cards.title: Spanish Launch Readiness Audit
cards.body: Structured findings, severity ratings, and readiness recommendations before launch or relaunch.

cards.title: Spanish Experience Repair
cards.body: To improve Spanish content, product copy, help content, messaging, or customer-facing experiences.

cards.title: ACI Talk / Executive Briefing
cards.body: Practical Cultural Intelligence, cross-cultural communication, and audience-readiness guidance.

cards.title: Spanish Quality Advisory
cards.body: Ongoing senior Spanish quality leadership, standards, workflows, and decision support.

items.label: 20+ YEARS
items.text: Global localization and language quality experience.

items.label: SPANISH FOCUS
items.text: LatAm, US Hispanic, Spain, and regional variants.

items.label: BUILT FOR
items.text: AI, Product, SaaS, EdTech, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams.

items.label: EXPERTISE
items.text: Across language assurance, localization, QA, cultural intelligence, and business communication.

finalCta.headline: Let's find the right Spanish quality path for your team.
finalCta.body: Whether you need to validate AI outputs, improve Spanish content, train a global team, or understand a Hispanic audience, Xpandia can help you choose the right next step.
